name: Discovery Insure

Compliance.description: FSCA licensed non-life insurer (reg 2009/011882/06), authorised FSP, no major 2025/2026 violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 4.11/5 (2,712 reviews, 74% 5-star), high TrustIndex 9/10, top insurer rankings.

Product Value.description: Competitive premiums R499-R699/pm base, high rewards (50% fuel back), extensive cover options incl warranty/portables.

Innovation.description: Vitality Drive telematics/AI coach, safety features, digital claims, behavior rewards, app integration.

Customer Support.description: Emergency line, claims 4-7 days avg, phone/app/email channels, mixed feedback but proactive on HelloPeter.

Accessibility & Security.description: Digital app/portal access, POPIA compliant, secure systems; minor impersonation incident affecting few clients, no system breach.

keyFeatures: Vitality Drive up to 50% fuel cashback

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From R499/mo Core plan; fuel cashback up to R1,500/mo

socialSentiment.summary: Strong positive on HelloPeter/Feefo; some group complaints on Trustpilot; praised for innovation/rewards.
